facts.statement: Tardigrades are also called water bears.

facts.statement: Tardigrades were first described by Johann August Ephraim Goeze in 1773.
questions: Who first described tardigrades?
When were tardigrades first described?
What scientist discovered tardigrades?

facts.statement: Johann August Ephraim Goeze was a German zoologist.
questions: What was Johann August Ephraim Goeze's profession?

facts.statement: Most tardigrades are between 0.3 and 0.5 millimeters long.
questions: How long are most tardigrades?
What is the typical size of a tardigrade?
How big do tardigrades grow?
Are tardigrades extremophiles?
What type of organisms are tardigrades?
Can tardigrades survive extreme conditions?

facts.statement: Tardigrades can enter a dehydrated state called a tun.
questions: What is the dehydrated state of tardigrades called?
Can tardigrades enter a state called a tun?
What survival state can tardigrades enter?

facts.statement: In the tun state, tardigrade metabolism drops to less than 0.01 percent of normal.
questions: How much does tardigrade metabolism drop in the tun state?
What happens to tardigrade metabolism in the tun state?
How low can tardigrade metabolism go?

facts.statement: Tardigrades in the tun state have survived temperatures near absolute zero.
questions: What extreme cold temperatures can tardigrades survive?
Can tardigrades survive near absolute zero?
How cold can tardigrades withstand?

facts.statement: Tardigrades in the tun state have survived pressures greater than the deepest ocean trenches.
questions: What extreme pressures can tardigrades survive?
Can tardigrades survive deep ocean pressures?
How much pressure can tardigrades withstand?

facts.statement: Tardigrades in the tun state have survived the vacuum of outer space.
questions: Can tardigrades survive in space?
Have tardigrades survived the vacuum of space?
Can tardigrades live in outer space?

facts.statement: In 2007, tardigrades became the first animals known to survive direct exposure to space.
questions: When did tardigrades become the first animals to survive space exposure?
What was the first animal to survive direct exposure to space?
Were tardigrades the first animals to survive in space?
